buildCommand: pip3 install --break-system-packages --user -r requirements.txt && python3 -m mkdocs build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self' https://pai.direct https://*.pai.direct
